ambiguities.source_text: Append the Branch information to the Customer information
ambiguities.ref:
branches_rad["_key"] = 1
customers_rad["_key"] = 1
cross = customers_rad.merge(branches_rad, on="_key", how="outer", suffixes=("", "_b"))

ambiguities.intent: Constrain the arccos input to [-1, 1] before calculating distance to avoid floating-point invalid values.

ambiguities.source_text: For each Branch, assign a Customer Priority rating, the closest customer having a rating of 1

ambiguities.intent: If multiple branches tie as closest for a customer, keep the first matching branch row produced by the Customer-Branch combinations.
Sort final rows by Branch Long ascending, then Customer Priority ascending.
ambiguities.ref: out = out.sort_values(by=["Branch Long", "Customer Priority"], ascending=[True, True]).reset_index(drop=True)
